zh.lifeSummary: 當Niesgen Jacobs Withaer於大約1608年出生在荷蘭霍蘭萊登時，她的父親Jacob Withaer27歲，母親Niesge Withaer26歲。她於1633年12月31日與Pieter van Hasebrouck在荷蘭-拉藍德萊登結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1657年之後在荷蘭-拉藍德萊德爾多普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Niesgen Jacobs Withaer于大约1608年出生在荷兰霍蘭萊登时，她的父亲Jacob Withaer27岁，母亲Niesge Withaer26岁。她于1633年12月31日与Pieter van Hasebrouck在荷兰-拉藍德萊登结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1657年之后在荷兰-拉藍德萊德爾多普。

nameMeanings.name: Withaer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Wither or its Old Norse cognate Vitharr, Withar.
perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived by a willow tree, from an agent derivative of Middle English withi ‘willow’ (Old English wīthig). Compare Withey .

variants.name: Withey
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a willow tree, Middle English withy (Old English wīthig).

variants.name: Withers
meanings: English: variant of Wither , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Niesgen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Wolfgang, Guenter, Hans, Manfred, Wolfram.
German (Rhineland): patronymic from the personal name   Nies  .

variants.name: Nies
meanings: form of   Agnes  , now also used, usually without the accent, in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Jacobs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: "English navigator Henry Hudson, under contract to the United East India Company, sails from Amsterdam and ""discovers""Manhattan Island and the future site of New York."

Henry Hudson sailed into the river that now bears his name. English explorer Henry Hudson sailed into the river that now bears his name. Hudson sailed for the Dutch East India Company in search of the Northwest Passage, a water route linking the Atlantic and Pacific Oceans, when he sailed up the present-day Hudson River.
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Niesgen Jacobs Withaer was born about 1608, in Leiden, Holland, Netherlands, her father, Jacob Withaer, was 27 and her mother, Niesge Withaer, was 26. She married Pieter van Hasebrouck on 31 December 1633, in Leiden, South Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died after 1657, in Leiderdorp, South Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Niesgen Jacobs Withaer est née environ 1608, à Leiden, Holland, Pays-Bas, son père, Jacob Withaer, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Niesge Withaer, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Pieter van Hasebrouck le 31 décembre 1633, à Leiden, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1657, à Leiderdorp, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Niesgen Jacobs Withaer um 1608 in Leiden, Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jacob Withaer 27 und ihre Mutter Niesge Withaer 26. Sie hat am 31. Dezember 1633 in Leiden, Südholland, Niederlande Pieter van Hasebrouck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1657 in Leiderdorp, Südholland, Niederlande.

it.Noord, Sint Anthonis, North Brabant, Net: Noord, Sint Anthonis, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi
it.lifeSummary: Quando Niesgen Jacobs Withaer è nata il circa 1608 nel Leiden, Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Jacob Withaer, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Niesge Withaer, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Pieter van Hasebrouck il 31 dicembre 1633, nel Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1657, nel Leiderdorp, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Niesgen Jacobs Withaerが約1608年にオランダホーランドレイデンで生まれた時，父Jacob Withaerは27歳，母Niesge Withaerは26歳であった。1633年12月31日にオランダズイド-hオランドレイデンでPieter van Hasebrouckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1657年以後にオランダズイド-hオランドレイデルドルプで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Niesgen Jacobs Withaer(이)가 대략 1608년 네덜란드 홀랜드 레이든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jacob Withaer(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Niesge Withaer(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1633년 12월 31일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 레이든에서 Pieter van Hasebrouck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1657년 이후 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 레이더도르프에서 사망했다.

pt.Noord, Sint Anthonis, North Brabant, Net: Noord, Sint Anthonis, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Niesgen Jacobs Withaer nasceu aproximadamente 1608, em Leiden, Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Jacob Withaer, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Niesge Withaer, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Pieter van Hasebrouck em 31 de dezembro de 1633, em Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1657, em Leiderdorp, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos.

ro.Noord, Sint Anthonis, North Brabant, Net: Noord, Sint Anthonis, Noord-Brabant, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Niesgen Jacobs Withaer родилась около 1608 г. в местности лиден, холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Jacob Withaer было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Niesge Withaer, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pieter van Hasebrouck 31 декабря 1633 г. в местности лиден, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1657 г. в местности лидирдорп, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды.

sm.about 1608–after 1657: e tusa o le 1608–ina ua ma'ea le 1657

es.Noord, Sint Anthonis, North Brabant, Net: Noord, Sint Anthonis, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Niesgen Jacobs Withaer nació aproximadamente 1608, en Leiden, Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Jacob Withaer, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Niesge Withaer, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Pieter van Hasebrouck el 31 de diciembre de 1633, en Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió después de 1657, en Leiderdorp, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos.
